name: get_vector_metric
description:
Searches internal Vector metrics by name and optionally by tags. Returns the first matching metric.

Internal Vector metrics functions work with a snapshot of the metrics. The interval at which the snapshot is updated is controlled through the [`metrics_storage_refresh_period`](/docs/reference/configuration/global-options/#metrics_storage_refresh_period) global option. Higher values can reduce performance impact of that process, but may cause stale metrics data in the snapshot.

arguments.name: tags
arguments.description: Tags to filter the results on. Values in this object support wildcards ('*') to match on parts of the tag value.

examples.title: Get a vector internal metric matching the name
Get a vector internal metric matching the name and tags
